help.title: Help center
help.subtitle: Everything you need to use Abbiatti day to day
help.footer: Need more help? Contact your agency administrator.

start.title: Quick start
start.desc: First steps to set up your account
start.s1: Create your account and confirm your email.
start.s2: Add your agency info in Settings → Agency.
start.s3: Create your first property from the Properties tab.
start.s4: Invite your team (cleaning, driver, co-host) from the Team tab.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.s1: See number of properties, members, and active tasks.
dashboard.s2: Use quick actions to add a property in one click.

properties.title: Properties
properties.s1: Click "Add property" then fill in the info.
properties.s2: Tip: paste an Airbnb / Booking / Vrbo link to auto-fill the form.
properties.s3: Set the access code and entry instructions for guests.
properties.s4: Activate or deactivate a property based on availability.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.s1: Add a reservation manually or via an iCal calendar.
reservations.s2: Fill in guest info (name, WhatsApp, language, arrival time).
reservations.s3: Pick a message template and open WhatsApp in one click.
reservations.s4: Sync all calendars with the "Sync" button.

ical.title: iCal calendars
ical.s1: On Airbnb: Calendar → Availability → Export calendar.
ical.s2: Copy the iCal link and paste it in Reservations → Add iCal link.
ical.s3: Sync runs automatically and new reservations appear.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.s1: Create a task, choose type, property, and assignee.
tasks.s2: The member sees the task in "My tasks" and clicks Start.
tasks.s3: They take photos before / during / after and report any issue.
tasks.s4: They finish the task and rate guest satisfaction.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.s1: Add items (linen, products, consumables) per property.
inventory.s2: Set an alert threshold to be warned of low stock.
inventory.s3: Filter by category or show only low stock.

team.title: Team
team.s1: Click "Add a member" then choose their role.
team.s2: A temporary password is generated, share it with the member.
team.s3: Assign the member to the relevant properties.
team.s4: The member logs in and only sees their properties and tasks.

qr.title: QR code login
qr.s1: In Team, click "Generate login QR" for a member.
qr.s2: Print the QR code (valid for 1 hour).
qr.s3: The member scans the QR with their phone: they're logged in.

templates.title: Message templates
templates.s1: Go to Settings → Messages to create your templates.
templates.s2: Write the message in French, English and Arabic.

settings.title: Settings
settings.s1: Profile: your name, phone, preferred language.
settings.s2: Agency: name and info visible to your team.
settings.s3: Security: change your password or request an email link.

lang.title: Languages
lang.s1: Use the language switcher in the top right.
lang.s2: The interface flips to RTL automatically for Arabic.

q1.q: Can I manage multiple properties with one account?
q1.a: Yes, you can add as many properties as you want in the same agency.

q2.q: Do my members see all properties?
q2.a: No. Each member only sees the properties you assigned them to.

q3.q: How do I avoid double bookings?
q3.a: Connect the iCal calendars from Airbnb, Booking and Vrbo. Reservations sync automatically.

q4.q: What if a member doesn't have an email?
q4.a: Generate a login QR code from the Team tab. They scan it and they're in.

q5.q: How do I change my language?
q5.a: Click the language switcher (FR / EN / AR) in the top right.

q6.q: How do I reset my password?
q6.a: Go to Settings → Security → "Email me a reset link".

rentals.title: Extras & Services
rentals.subtitle: Extra revenue items to offer at booking or arrival
